title: l2-uk-direct vocabulary entry
description: L1-agnostic vocabulary. No translation field in core. IPA is required and first.

pronunciation_video.description: YouTube URL for native speaker pronunciation — primary pronunciation anchor, replaces IPA

emoji.description: Semantic anchor emoji — fallback when image_url is null

image_url.description: Cloudinary URL. Null until image is sourced via Pixabay and uploaded.

image_alt.description: Ukrainian alt text for the image

category.description: Semantic category in Ukrainian e.g. тварини, їжа, дія

question.description: Grammar category expressed as question word — never use grammatical terms

examples.description: Simple Ukrainian sentences using this word. No English.

context_video.description: YouTube URL showing the word in real Ukrainian context — pure Ukrainian content only
